min_entry_age.source_quote: Entry age of Proposer should be between eighteen (18) years and sixty five (65) years.

max_entry_age.source_quote: Maximum entry age of any family member is sixty five (65) years.

min_child_entry_age.source_quote: Children over the age of three (03) months and up to twenty five (25) years may be covered for the first time, provided

sum_insured_options.source_quote: The Policy is available with options of SI of ₹ 3L, 5L, 10L.

grace_period.source_quote: The Policy may be renewed by mutual consent, before the expiry of the Policy or a within a Grace Period of thirty (30) days after expiry of the Policy.

free_look_period.source_quote: The insured person shall be allowed free look period of thirty days from date of receipt of the policy document to review the terms and conditions of the policy.

initial_waiting_period_days.source_quote: Expenses related to the treatment of any illness within thirty (30) days from the first Policy commencement date shall be excluded

pre_existing_disease_waiting_months.source_quote: Expenses related to the treatment of a Pre-Existing Disease (PED) and its direct complications shall be excluded until the expiry of thirty six (36) months of continuous coverage after the date of

specific_disease_waiting_months.source_quote: shall be excluded until the expiry of 90 days/ one year/ two year/ three years (as specified against specific disease/ procedure) of continuous coverage after the date of inception of the first Policy with us.

maternity_waiting_months.source_quote: Delivery or termination within a Waiting Period of twelve (12) months.

pre_hospitalization_days.source_quote: The Policy provides for Pre Hospitalisation (60 days) and Post Hospitalisation (90

post_hospitalization_days.source_quote: The Policy provides for Pre Hospitalisation (60 days) and Post Hospitalisation (90

day_care_treatments_count.source_quote: provides for Pre Hospitalisation (60 days) and Post Hospitalisation (90 days) expenses, 140+ Day Care Procedures

network_hospital_count.source_note: 5322 Network Hospitals ('Why Choose NICL' section, scraped 2026-05-15)

co_payment_pct.source_quote: If the Proposer/ Insured opts for Optional Co-payment of 10% on each admissible claim under the Policy (including Optional Cover), a discount of 8% shall be allowe

room_rent_capped_at_pct_of_si.source_quote: Room Rent per day shall be payable up to 1% of Sum Insured per day

policy_term_options_years.source_quote: The Policy can only be issued for a period of one (01) year, which shall be the Policy Period.

ayush_coverage.source_quote: AYUSH Treatment: The Company shall indemnify Medical Expenses incurred for Inpatient Care treatment under Ayurveda, Yoga and Naturopathy, Unani, Siddha and Homeopathy systems of medicines during each Policy Period up to the limit of Sum Insured

maternity_coverage.source_quote: Natal Hospitalisation expenses per delivery, including expenses for necessary vaccination for the New Born Baby

newborn_coverage.source_quote: The New Born Baby shall be automatically covered from birth under the Sum Insured available to the mother during the corresponding Policy Period, for up to 3 months of age.

organ_donor_expenses.source_quote: 1.2.1.10 Organ Donor's Hospitalisation Expenses The Company shall indemnify the Medical Expenses incurred in respect of an organ donor's Hospitalisation during the Policy Period for harvesting of the organ donated to an Insured Person

preventive_health_checkup.source_quote: GOOD HEALTH INCENTIVE Preventive Health Check Up Expenses of preventive health check-up/ prescribed diagnostic tests will be reimbursed once at the end of a block of three (03) continuous years

cashless_treatment_supported.source_quote: The Policy provides for Cashless Facility and/ or reimbursement of Hospitalisation expenses for treatment of Illness or Injury.

geographic_coverage.source_quote: Treatment taken outside the geographical limits of India

policy_type_indemnity_or_fixed.source_quote: BoB National Health Policy is an indemnity health insurance policy designed for the account holders of Bank of Baroda.

room_rent_capping.source_quote: Room Rent per day shall be payable up to 1% of Sum Insured per day
